title: helianthemum montanum var. oelandicum
intro: Helianthemum montanum var. oelandicum, also known as the Oeland Rockrose, is a variety of the alpine rose species that is native to the Baltic region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helianthemum montanum var. oelandicum include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to act as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in the production of topical creams and ointments.
